title: docs/generated/tests manifest
description: Schema for docs/generated/tests/_meta/manifest.yaml. Bundle keys are role-rooted (conformance/<doc> for language-reference-anchored bundles, design/<area>/<doc> for generated-design-anchored bundles). Tests in each bundle derive their claims from the bundle's source_doc and are never written against source-line gaps.

default_size_cap_files.description: Soft cap on .slang files per bundle when the bundle entry omits size_cap_files.

bundles.description: Map of bundle key -> bundle spec. The bundle key is the role-rooted path of the bundle: conformance/<doc> for language-reference-anchored bundles, design/<area>/<doc> for generated-design-anchored bundles. The bundle directory is docs/generated/tests/<key>/, and the per-bundle prompt is co-located there as _prompt.md (derived, not stored here).

source_doc.description: Workspace-relative path to the documentation file this bundle's tests are anchored to. conformance/ bundles cite docs/language-reference/; design/ bundles cite docs/generated/design/.

watched_paths.description: Workspace-relative globs of source files that, when changed, mark this bundle stale. Mirror the docs manifest's watched_paths for the same logical area.

depends_on.description: Bundle keys whose README.md is provided as context to the agent (Phase C cross-link pass).

coverage_targets.description: Workspace-relative paths to slangc source files this bundle is responsible for exercising. Used by `expansion-candidates` to rank bundles by under-coverage. Never fed line-by-line into a test-writing prompt.

size_cap_files.description: Soft cap on .slang files in this bundle. Lint warns above it.
